message:
feat(engine): fix stale declassification receipt eviction, extend TS type-only import elision, and add unit tests across 12 source modules

Fix a bug in execution_orchestrator where staged declassification
receipts were only evicted on success; they are now cleaned up
unconditionally after attempted use, preventing stale entries from
accumulating when receipt-linked declassification fails.

Extend ts_normalization to handle mixed type-only import/export
specifiers (e.g. import { type Foo, Bar }, export type *) via a new
rewrite-based elision pass that preserves string/comment boundaries.
Add rewrite_outside_strings_and_comments, find_import_export_statement_end,
and rewrite_type_only_import_export_statement helpers.

Add ~5,200 lines of unit tests covering serde round-trips, enum variant
exhaustiveness, Display/as_str consistency, error formatting,
multi-threaded seqlock reads, callback arity profiles, dispatch chain
fusion, and regression detection across: asupersync_contract_matrix,
callback_stdlib_dispatch, category_shift_report, claim_atom_lattice,
law_mining, observability_publication_bundle, operator_diagnostic_contract,
rgc_planning_track, seqlock_fastpath, and seqlock_reader_writer_contract.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
